infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoAttendance needs your location to verify attendance at your workplace.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GeoAttendance needs background location access to track attendance accurately.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GeoAttendance needs background location access to track attendance accurately.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoAttendance needs camera access to take a selfie for attendance verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GeoAttendance needs access to your photo library for profile pictures.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow GeoAttendance to use your location.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow GeoAttendance to access your camera for attendance verification.
